subject: Tiếng Anh 12
name: Part 4: Reading
description: Đọc hiểu về sống xanh và phát triển bền vững

theory.title: Reading: Green Living and Sustainable Development

sections.heading: Reading Skills
sections.content:
Chủ đề: Green living and sustainable development

Kỹ năng:

  • Đọc hiểu về lối sống xanh
  • Tìm thông tin về các giải pháp môi trường
  • Hiểu về năng lượng tái tạo
  • Phân tích lợi ích của sống bền vững

Nội dung: Bài đọc giới thiệu về:

  • Environmental problems: Ô nhiễm, biến đổi khí hậu
  • Green solutions: Năng lượng tái tạo, tái chế
  • Individual actions: Hành động cá nhân có thể làm
  • Benefits: Lợi ích của sống xanh

exercises.passage:
Green living is a lifestyle that aims to reduce an individual's or society's use of Earth's natural resources. It involves making choices that are better for the environment, which includes reducing waste, conserving energy, and using sustainable products.

One of the most important principles of green living is the 3Rs: Reduce, Reuse, and Recycle. We should cut down on consumption and avoid buying unnecessary items. Instead of throwing away items, we can reuse them or give them to others. Recycling materials like paper, plastic, and glass helps reduce the amount of waste sent to landfills, which take up valuable land and pollute the environment.

Another key aspect is energy conservation. We should turn off lights and appliances when not in use. Installing solar panels, which convert sunlight into electricity, is an excellent way to use renewable energy. Using public transportation or cycling instead of driving also helps reduce carbon emissions, which contribute to climate change.

Many people are now choosing eco-friendly products, which are made from sustainable materials and are biodegradable. Organic food, which is grown without harmful chemicals, is better for both our health and the environment. By making these small changes in our daily lives, we can make a big difference in protecting our planet for future generations.

questions.question: What is the main idea of the passage?
options: Green living involves making environmentally-friendly choices
Only rich people can live green
questions.explanation: Đoạn văn nói về sống xanh là việc đưa ra các lựa chọn thân thiện với môi trường.

questions.question: What are the 3Rs mentioned in the passage?
questions.explanation: Ba chữ R là: Reduce (giảm), Reuse (tái sử dụng), Recycle (tái chế).

questions.question: The word 'convert' in paragraph 3 is closest in meaning to ______.
According to the passage, what helps reduce carbon emissions?
questions.explanation: Sử dụng phương tiện công cộng hoặc đi xe đạp giúp giảm khí thải carbon.

questions.question: What is true about organic food according to the passage?
options: It's more expensive than regular food
questions.explanation: Thực phẩm hữu cơ được trồng không có hóa chất độc hại.
